Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Paris Olympics 2024: Team SA in action on Sunday, 28 July

Team SA head into Day 3 of the Paris Olympics 2024 with one medal in the bank, courtesy of the men’s rugby sevens team.

Team SAhead into the third day of theParis Olympics 2024with one medal in the bank, courtesy of the men’s rugby sevens team who took the bronze medal.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

There is a full day of competition, with Team SA involved in10sports, but only one (mountain bike cycling) is a medals event.

Follow all the latest updates clickHERE.

All times SA.

Women’s MTB cross-country (14:10):Candice Lill

Eventing, cross-country (10:30-15:00):Alexander Peternell

Men’s epee, table of 64 (10:00):Harry Sanee vs Vadim Sharlaimov (Kaz)

Men’s epee, table of 32 (12:25):Harry Sanee TBC

Men’s epee, table of 16 (15:05):Harry Sanee TBC

Men’s epee, table of 8 (16:25):Harry Sanee TBC

Men’s epee, semi-finals (20:00):Harry Sanee TBC

Women’s artistic, qualifying (09:30):Caitlin Rooskrantz

Women’s Pool B (12:45):Team SA vs Australia

Men’s Pool A (20:15):Team SA vs Great Britain

Men’s pair, heats (11:20):Christopher Baxter and John Smith

Women’s Pool B (16:00):Team SA vs Australia

Women’s Pool B (19:00):Team SA vs Ireland

Women’s 100m breaststroke, heats (11:36):Tatjana Smith

Men’s 100m backstroke, heats (11:54):Pieter Coetze

Women’s 200m freestyle, heats (12:12):Aimee Canny

Women’s 100m butterfly, final (20:40):Erin Gallagher TBC

Women’s 100m breaststroke, semi-finals (21:10):Tatjana Smith TBC

Men’s 100m backstroke, semi-finals (21:32):Pieter Coetze TBC

Women’s 200m freestyle, semi-finals (21:50):Aimee Canny TBC

Women’s street prelims (12:00):Boipelo Awuah

Women’s street final (17:00):Boipelo Awuah TBC

Women’s second round (19:00):Sarah Baum vs Camila Kemp (Ger)

Men’s round 2 (11:48):Jordy Smith and Matt McGillivray

description: Team SA head into Day 3 of the Paris Olympics 2024 with one medal in the bank, courtesy of the men’s rugby sevens team.
